description_long: This is a large, rectangular vending machine with a teal-colored metal exterior and a prominent illuminated display panel on the front. The front face features a transparent window showcasing a variety of beverages, with product selection buttons and a payment interface to the right. The sides of the machine are decorated with a large, stylized floral or geometric logo and the words 'MULTI+VEN' in bold, colorful letters. The machine has a sturdy, industrial build, typical of urban vending machines found on sidewalks or in public spaces. The lower front section includes a product retrieval slot and additional branding. The back of the machine is plain and unadorned, with no visible openings or features.
description: A teal metal vending machine with a large front display, product window, and bold 'MULTI+VEN' branding on the sides. Features include a payment interface, selection buttons, and a product retrieval slot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large 'MULTI+VEN' logo and teal metal surface, with no visible functional components.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the illuminated product window, selection buttons, payment interface, retrieval slot, and branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 with the same 'MULTI+VEN' logo and teal finish.
description_view_3: Rear view, plain and featureless with a solid teal surface and no visible openings or branding.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular illuminated display panel is located on the upper front of the machine, showing product images and branding.
attribute_payment_interface: Multiple payment interfaces are present on the right side of the front face, including a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is located to the right of the display panel, each labeled for a specific product.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot with a flap is located on the lower front section of the machine.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large 'MULTI+VEN' branding with a stylized geometric logo is present on both sides and the lower front, in white, yellow, and teal colors.
